This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] snapchanged event fires after snap target changes on touch scroll
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: "error: Action action_sequence failed"
[PASS] snapchanged event fires after snap target changes on wheel scroll
[FAIL] snapchanged event fires after snap target changes on scrollbar drag
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: "error: Action action_sequence failed"
[PASS] snapchanged event fires after snap target changes on keydown press
[PASS] snapchanged is not fired if snap target doesn't change on user scroll
Harness: the test ran to completion.
